name: Italian Beef (Fcmk08a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rump roast on a rack in an oven-safe dish and cook at 325°F for 40 minutes per pound. Cool and slice paper thin.
2. In a pan, add the pan drippings. Add the remaining ingredients. Simmer for 15 minutes. Add sliced beef and marinate in sauce for 5 hours - overnight.
3. When ready to serve, bring the mixture to a simmer on top of the stove. Do not boil.
4. Serve on Italian bread or rolls.
